_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to try different outdoor and water activities and think about what affects how well we can do them.

_source.w: We are learning to try different outdoor and water activities and think about what affects how well we can do them.
y: Experiencing diverse physical activities helps us find what we enjoy.
Understanding what helps and hinders our participation builds self-awareness.
Outdoor and water activities develop skills that keep us safe and active.
eg: Trying a new outdoor game and talking about what made it easy or hard.
Practising water safety skills and discussing what helped us feel confident.
Exploring a bush trail and discussing how the terrain affected our movement.
Talking about how weather affects outdoor play.
Identifying factors like equipment, space, and rules that affect our participation.
Discussing what helps us feel safe and confident in new physical environments.
